result:
Reports written. Here's a summary of what was found:

---

## Bug Hunt Results — 2026-02-23

**10 findings** (4 high, 5 medium, 1 low)

### High Severity
| # | Title | File | Fix |
|---|-------|------|-----|
| 001 | `useIsTablet` not exported — **6 TS build errors** | `hooks/index.ts` | Export or create the hook |
| 002 | `lastActivityDate` stored as `.toDateString()`, compared to YYYY-MM-DD | `useUserStore.ts:559` | One-line: use `getDateString()` |
| 003 | Daily reset checks UTC date vs. local date string | `(tabs)/index.tsx:75` | One-line: use `getDateString()` |
| 004 | `FillBlankExercise` crashes if `exercise.blanks` is undefined | `FillBlankExercise.tsx:156` | Null guard before map |

### Medium Severity
| # | Title |
|---|-------|
| 005 | `TapSelectExercise` awards "correct" on empty options array |
| 006 | Review tab divides by zero → renders `NaN%` |
| 007 | Soft-ask modal checks stale `lessonsCompleted` from closure |
| 008 | Referral deep-link code validated but **never persisted** |
| 009 | Rapid double-tap on last exercise can overrun index bounds |

### Low Severity
| # | Title |
|---|-------|
| 010 | Weekly activity ring off-by-one near midnight in non-UTC timezones |

### Quick Wins (< 5 min each)
Findings #1–4 and #6 are all one- or two-line fixes that collectively unblock the build and fix the streak/date system.

REVIEW_COMPLETE
